---
mode: agent
agent: Edi The Editor
description: Run Edi the Editor on a page or section of the Ivy in Manila prospectus.
---

Use the `Edi The Editor` agent to review the following prospectus content.

Paste the page name and the raw copy or HTML section below:

**Page / Section**: [e.g., Partnership page hero, Newsletter intro, My Story closing paragraph]

**Content to review**:
```
[Paste your text or HTML here]
```

Edi will check:
- Grammar, spelling, and punctuation
- Clarity and readability (target Flesch-Kincaid Grade 8–10)
- Prospectus tone — professional but emotionally resonant, appropriate for church members and family
- Fundraising ask effectiveness (relational context, specific need, invitation framing)
- CTA strength and word choice
- Tone anti-patterns: guilt pressure, savior framing, vague impact, hollow gratitude

The output will include a fully edited version ready to use, plus a prioritized list of fixes.
